rulings.Case Title: IN RE BENNETT FAMILY TRUST, DATED MAY 15, 1997
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Separate Statement Of Interrogatories In Dispute; Declaration Of Joseph P. Corey
rulings.Rulings: Grant as to specially prepared interrogatories 20 and 21; Petitioner's request for sanctions is granted in the total amount of $1,200.00 against Respondent Marlon Redmond and his counsel; Respondent's request for sanctions is denied.
